failedAssertions.reason: During persistent server outage, TUI process exited instead of continuing with a clear in-app unreachable status.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No explicitly designated safe/sandbox iMessage recipient was available for live send validation.

appliedUpdates.description: Added CLI surface concurrency classification and Flow Validator Guidance for tuistory boundary/isolation usage.
Documented localhost-to-127.0.0.1 curl fallback and Ctrl+number tuistory shortcut fallback via click navigation.
